title: Nimbus Wallet (deprecated due to impracticability)
description: A finance management application using the MERN stack for expense tracking, budgeting, and financial insights. Implementing a CI/CD pipeline with Docker and Jenkins for deployment on Raspberry PI

title: Cyber-Tetris
description: A replicate Tetris game in Java Swing, featuring core gameplay mechanics, real-time scoring and linear difficulty. Integrated with client-server model system allowing 2 players to play wireless locally

title: Nascita - Coffee Shop Management System
description: A Go-based microservice architecture for a coffee shop application combining with gRPC for bi-directional streaming and handle request efficiently with Gorilla Mux, leading to a 40% improvement in scalability

title: Zein - AI Generative SaaS
description: A web-based AI assistant using TypeScript, Next.js, and Node.js, integrating OpenAI and Replicate AI APIs to provide generative AI service

title: TicTacToe
description: A web-based yet classic game for you and your friend.
